ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "adj_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price of the security on that date */,
  "adj_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted highest price of the security on that date */,
  "adj_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price of the security on that date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the security on that date */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the security on that date */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend paid on that date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Stock split ratio on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_info" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, trader) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the external data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data (e.g., API, feed) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the external data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was received */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering an alert */,
  "alert_triggered" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if an alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)
